evidence.claim: The reward store contains virtual items.
evidence.fact: The reward store offers virtual items.
evidence.user_story_span: The reward store contains both virtual items
evidence.fact_span: The reward store offers virtual items

evidence.claim: The system allows a nugget wallet redeemable for virtual items in a reward store.
evidence.fact: The reward store lets students use their nugget wallet to acquire virtual items or institution-specific benefits that the instructor has set up.
evidence.user_story_span: a nugget wallet redeemable in a reward store for virtual items
evidence.fact_span: use their nugget wallet to acquire virtual items

evidence.claim: The student has earned nuggets in their wallet.
evidence.fact: Nuggets accumulated by a student are stored in a wallet and can be used to purchase virtual rewards or instructor-defined institutional privileges from a store.
evidence.user_story_span: a student has earned nuggets in their wallet
evidence.fact_span: Nuggets accumulated by a student are stored in a wallet

evidence.claim: The system allows a nugget wallet redeemable for instructor-configured institutional perks in a reward store.
evidence.fact: The reward store lets students use their nugget wallet to acquire virtual items or institution-specific benefits that the instructor has set up.
evidence.fact_span: institution-specific benefits that the instructor has set up

evidence.claim: The student receives a perk applied.
evidence.fact: Teachers can issue bonus rewards to a specific student, and every such action leaves an audit trail with the stated rationale.
evidence.user_story_span: the student receives the reward (virtual item unlock or perk applied)

evidence.claim: The reward store contains real-world perks configured by instructors.
evidence.fact: The learner's nugget account is redeemable in a shop for digital goods or for real-world benefits that instructors have configured.
evidence.fact_span: real-world benefits that instructors have configured

evidence.fact: Nuggets accumulated by a student are stored in a wallet and can be used to purchase virtual rewards or instructor-defined institutional privileges from a store.

evidence.claim: Nuggets are earned through desired behaviors.
evidence.fact: Getting several questions right in succession increases the nugget multiplier through three stages, and a single incorrect answer eliminates the bonus.
evidence.user_story_span: Nuggets are earned through desired behaviors
